title: EnrollmentPayload v1
description: Body posted by custos-runner at first-boot enrollment; the arx-side coordination service resolves tenant_id server-side from the token_hash. Sourced from Plan 11 T4 CLI wire (see tests/test_cli_enroll.py:220).

token_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the one-shot enrollment token; the raw token never crosses the wire.

runner_id.description: Client-generated runner identity; carried in all downstream heartbeat / status subjects.

agent_version.description: custos-runner version string, e.g. 0.2.0 — arx uses this to gate deprecation warnings.

capabilities.description: Optional runner capability tags (nautilus / noop-host / …). Default: [].
